info.name: Spin Identity API
info.description: Postman collection for the Spin Identity API under /api.

body.raw:
{
  "document_type": "kra_pin",
  "reason": "Missing KRA PIN certificate",
  "label": "KRA PIN Certificate",
  "deadline": "2026-05-30T00:00:00Z",
  "applicant_notes": "Please upload the latest certificate."
}

{
  "realm_id": "{{realmId}}",
  "name": "Demo System",
  "slug": "demo-system",
  "description": "Demo system",
  "logo_url": "",
  "website": "https://example.com",
  "password_type": "password",
  "allow_password_login": true,
  "allow_passwordless_login": true,
  "allow_magic_link_login": true,
  "allow_social_login": true,
  "allowed_social_providers": [
    "google"
  ],
  "passwordless_only": false,
  "registration_open": true,
  "auto_login_after_registration": true,
  "requires_approval": false,
  "allows_referrals": true,
  "referral_reward_amount": "100.00",
  "auto_verify_referrals": false,
  "mfa_required": false,
  "mfa_required_enforced": false,
  "allowed_mfa_methods": [],
  "refresh_token_timeout_minutes": null,
  "mfa_reauth_window_minutes": 0,
  "country_ids": [
    "{{countryId}}"
  ]
}
